title: ActionCompletedPayload
description: A command terminated successfully. Every ActionRequested terminates in exactly one ActionCompleted or ActionFailed; the envelope's causationId = the command's eventId. Producer: minecraft-service on world.events.

commandId.description: The eventId of the ActionRequested command this outcome answers.

result.description: Action-specific outcome data (e.g. finalPosition, blocksTraveled for move).
